CustomField.description: API name of the field to check in the condition.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Usage depends on Requirement Type. Standard rules (MustEqualValue,RequiredWhen etc.): Enter the Field API Name. RelatedRecordExists rules: Enter the SOQL filter criteria (e.g., Name = 'Transactional Email' AND PrivacyConsentStatus = 'OptIn').
CustomField.label: Condition Field
